name: Compare workers comp vs suing after job ladder fall?

mainEntity.name: Compare workers comp vs suing after job ladder fall?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp fast no-fault; suit for extras.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Comp: quick, no-fault medical/wages**; suing: pain damages, slower proof needed.[1][6]

Comp first, then third-party.

| Aspect | Workers' Comp | Lawsuit |
|--------|---------------|---------|
| Fault | No | Yes |
| Covers | Med/Wages | All + Pain |
| Time | Fast | 1-2 yrs |

Best: both if possible.

description: Comp fast no-fault; suit for extras.
